A1.evidence: 3 RED signal(s): Park Inn Riyadh Centre, Casablanca, Radisson Blu Casablanca City
A1.recommendation: Asset management to schedule owner calls; review fee flexibility for at-risk properties.

A2.evidence: 11 RED signal(s) threatening revenue model: RAD010, , Riyadh, Casablanca
A2.recommendation: Re-run P&L models for affected markets; extend breakeven sensitivity range to 48 months.

A3.evidence: Rival(s) signed in Radisson target submarket(s): Marriott, Hilton, IHG
A3.recommendation: Development Director to confirm Radisson has no overlapping pipeline in same submarket.

A4.evidence: Energy/labour costs exceeding 10% threshold in: , United Arab Emirates, Netherlands, United Kingdom, Italy, France, Germany
A4.recommendation: CFO to re-baseline cost model; review CAPEX timing and procurement contracts.

A5.evidence: Rival loyalty devaluation detected — potential switching opportunity: Marriott
A5.recommendation: Brief loyalty team; consider targeted status-match campaign within 30 days.

A6.evidence: M&A pipeline providing adequate deal flow.

A7.evidence: 7 RED brand signal(s) — properties affected: RAD025, Park Inn Riyadh Centre, Radisson Blu Casablanca City, RAD022
A7.recommendation: VP Marketing and VP Operations to activate guest recovery protocol and crisis comms.

A8.evidence: 4 RED loyalty signal(s) — member share or programme health deteriorating
A8.recommendation: VP Loyalty to present programme competitiveness review to CMO within 30 days.

A9.evidence: 33 RED ESG/compliance signal(s) — penalty or regulatory risk active
A9.recommendation: CFO and General Counsel to review ESG compliance exposure; approve remediation capex.

A10.evidence: 23 RED franchise partner signal(s) — properties: RAD010, RAD022, RAD008, RAD007
A10.recommendation: Asset Management Director to engage distressed franchisees; prepare contingency plan.

H1.short: H1 — Pause LOI; add FX floor clause
H1.full: FX depreciation exceeds 15% against EUR. Owner: Development Director. Action: Pause all LOI negotiations in affected market; add FX floor clause to any term sheet currently in negotiation. Deadline: before next LOI signature.

H2.short: H2 — Deprioritise market; redirect dev effort
H2.full: Supply pipeline exceeds 15% of existing stock — oversupply risk. Owner: Development Director. Action: Deprioritise market in pipeline review; redirect BD effort to next-priority country on target list. Deadline: next pipeline review meeting.

H3.short: H3 — Full 90-day hold + escalate to development committee
H3.full: Two or more simultaneous RED alerts in the same market. Owner: Chief Development Officer. Action: Immediate 90-day moratorium on all new signings in this market; brief Development Committee at next meeting; do not advance any LOI or HMA currently in negotiation. Deadline: notify committee within 5 business days.
